title: crataegus viridis var. lanceolata
intro: Crataegus viridis var. lanceolata, also known as the hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae), characterized by its lance-shaped leaves and fragrant white flowers. The medicinal properties of Crataegus viridis var. lanceolata lie in its ability to improve cardiovascular health, acting as a natural vasodilator and lowering blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of Crataegus viridis var. lanceolata include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular well-being and overall health.
